g.title: Foxa1 and Hnf4a transcription factor induction that drives MEFs toward an iEP (induced endoderm progenitor) program.
MEF culture dish: plated mouse embryonic fibroblasts, the starting population before induction toward iEP.

text.title: MEF culture dish: plated mouse embryonic fibroblasts, the starting population before induction toward iEP.

g.title: Successful reprogramming: on target route from MEFs, via Foxa1 and Hnf4a induction, to iEP cells, the intended fate.

text.title: Successful reprogramming: on target route from MEFs, via Foxa1 and Hnf4a induction, to iEP cells, the intended fate.

g.title: Off-target outcome: cells that fail to complete reprogramming to iEP and instead stall in dead-end states.

text.title: Off-target outcome: cells that fail to complete reprogramming to iEP and instead stall in dead-end states.
Foxa1 and Hnf4a: the transcription factor pair induced to drive MEF-to-iEP reprogramming.
